items.question: X has PMF p(0)=0.2, p(1)=0.5, p(2)=0.3. What is E[X]?
For the same X above, what is Var(X)?
Which identity always holds for any random variables X and Y (when expectations exist)?
items.explanation: Linearity of expectation requires no independence. The other identities need extra conditions or have reversed signs.

items.question: If X ~ Uniform(0, 8), what are E[X] and Var(X)?
